name: Ressa Table Lamp - 27 Inch Height - TBL4225 - Nickle - Safavieh
description: Bring contemporary elegance to your home with the RESSA 27 inch nickel iron table lamp. Its sleek design features a sophisticated nickel finish that complements any decor effortlessly. Crafted from durable iron, this lamp stands as a testament to modern style with its balanced proportions and smooth curves. The alluring metallic sheen ensures it will be a standout piece on any table, adding warmth and charm to your living space. Perfect for creating a cozy ambiance in your living room, bedroom, or office, the RESSA table lamp offers both beauty and functionality. Enjoy the luxurious touch it brings to your home decor.
